name: ktdeque
description: TypeScript port of the Kaplan-Tarjan purely-functional worst-case O(1) deque (kaplan2), verified by differential testing against a naive oracle — the same method as the C port.

scripts.fuzz: npm run typecheck && esbuild test/fuzz.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/fuzz.mjs && node dist/fuzz.mjs
scripts.wc: npm run typecheck && esbuild test/wc.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/wc.mjs && node dist/wc.mjs
scripts.fuzz6: npm run typecheck && esbuild test/fuzz6.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/fuzz6.mjs && node dist/fuzz6.mjs
scripts.wc6: npm run typecheck && esbuild test/wc6.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/wc6.mjs && node dist/wc6.mjs
scripts.test: npm run fuzz && npm run wc && npm run fuzz6 && npm run wc6
